title: Opal vs LiquidBounce: Which Minecraft Client Wins in 2026
description: Opal vs LiquidBounce: a polished $8.99 premium client with a glass UI, 200+ features, and minigame-tuned combat, versus the free open-source generalist. Honest breakdown.
excerpt: LiquidBounce is free and great for tinkering. Opal is $8.99 and built to win the moment you open it. Here is the honest breakdown.
author: Opal Team
